code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function StatusBadge(_ref){let{status}=_ref;const statusConfig={open:{bg:'bg-blue-100',text:'text-blue-700',label:'Open'},assigned:{bg:'bg-purple-100',text:'text-purple-700',label:'Assigned'},in_progress:{bg:'bg-yellow-100',text:'text-yellow-700',label:'In Progress'},resolved:{bg:'bg-emerald-100',text:'text-emerald-700',label:'Resolved'},closed:{bg:'bg-slate-100',text:'text-slate-700',label:'Closed'}};const config=statusConfig[status]||statusConfig.open;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold ${config.bg} ${config.text}`,children:config.label});}
